creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
texinfo file updated to be able to generate info doc.

	I'll send the patch to the texinfo file to the maintainer
	for futher releases.

	Makefile:
		build depenencies to texi2html and teTeX added.
		symlinks changed from absolute to relative.
		installation of info files.

	pkg-plist:
		symlinked files deleted.
		manual.texi deleted.
		info files added.

	files/patch-aa: (aka Makefile)
		updated to generate info, html and ps files.

	files/patch-manuel.texi
		new file.

How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
